title: Entry-Level Plant Manager at Apollo Tyres Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Plant Manager at Apollo Tyres Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
Apollo Tyres Advisory Limited has an exciting opening for a Plant Manager at our Pune office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Apollo Tyres Advisory Limited:
Apollo Tyres Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in APQP

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Apollo Tyres Advisory Limited!
